ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorCode: 400, message: "Bad Request", detail: error.description default "The request was malformed or contains invalid parameters.", path: attributes.requestPath default attributes.requestUri default "unknown" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorCode: 404, message: "Not Found", detail: error.description default "The requested resource could not be found.", path: attributes.requestPath default attributes.requestUri default "unknown" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorCode: 405, message: "Method Not Allowed", detail: error.description default "The HTTP method is not allowed for the requested resource.", path: attributes.requestPath default attributes.requestUri default "unknown" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorCode: 406, message: "Not Acceptable", detail: error.description default "The server cannot produce a response matching the list of acceptable values.", path: attributes.requestPath default attributes.requestUri default "unknown" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorCode: 401, message: "Unauthorized", detail: "Authentication is required to access this resource. Provide a valid Bearer token or API key.", path: attributes.requestPath default attributes.requestUri default "unknown" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorCode: 403, message: "Forbidden", detail: "You do not have sufficient permissions to access this resource.", path: attributes.requestPath default attributes.requestUri default "unknown" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorCode: 503, message: "Service Unavailable", detail: "A downstream service is currently unavailable. Please retry after a short interval.", path: attributes.requestPath default attributes.requestUri default "unknown" }

logger.message: #['[CORRELATION:' ++ correlationId ++ '] CONNECTIVITY failure: ' ++ (error.description default 'Downstream service unreachable')]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorCode: 504, message: "Gateway Timeout", detail: "A downstream service did not respond within the configured timeout window.", path: attributes.requestPath default attributes.requestUri default "unknown" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorCode: 429, message: "Too Many Requests", detail: "Rate limit exceeded. Please wait before making additional requests.", path: attributes.requestPath default attributes.requestUri default "unknown" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorCode: 400, message: "Bad Request", detail: "Validation failed: expected a boolean value. " ++ (error.description default ""), path: attributes.requestPath default attributes.requestUri default "unknown" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorCode: 400, message: "Bad Request", detail: "Validation failed: expected a numeric value. " ++ (error.description default ""), path: attributes.requestPath default attributes.requestUri default "unknown" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorCode: 503, message: "Service Unavailable", detail: "All retry attempts have been exhausted. The downstream service remains unavailable.", path: attributes.requestPath default attributes.requestUri default "unknown" }

logger.message: #['[CORRELATION:' ++ correlationId ++ '] RETRY_EXHAUSTED: All retries failed for downstream call']

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorCode: 500, message: "Internal Server Error", detail: "An expression evaluation error occurred while processing the request.", path: attributes.requestPath default attributes.requestUri default "unknown" }

logger.message: #['[CORRELATION:' ++ correlationId ++ '] EXPRESSION error: ' ++ (error.description default 'Expression evaluation failed')]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, errorCode: 500, message: "Internal Server Error", detail: "An unexpected error occurred. Please contact support with the correlationId for further investigation.", path: attributes.requestPath default attributes.requestUri default "unknown" }

logger.message: #['[CORRELATION:' ++ correlationId ++ '] UNHANDLED ERROR [' ++ (error.errorType.namespace default 'MULE') ++ ':' ++ (error.errorType.identifier default 'UNKNOWN') ++ ']: ' ++ (error.description default 'No description available')]
